top.title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model matters
top.summary: On the major benchmarks, according to results shared by the company, DeepSeek V4-Pro competes with leading closed-source models, matching the performance of Anthropic’s Claude-Opus-4.6, OpenAI’s GPT-5.4, and Google’s Gemini-3.1. It also helped set off a wave of open-weight model releases from other Chinese AI firms. By Caiwei Chen archive page April 24, 2026 Leon Neal/Getty Images On Friday, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model.

top.title: The Download: supercharged scams and studying AI healthcare
top.summary: We’re in a new era of AI-driven scams When ChatGPT was released in late 2022, it showed how easily generative AI could create human-like text. This quickly caught the eye of cybercriminals, who began using LLMs to compose malicious emails. AI is making them faster, cheaper, and easier to carry out, a problem set to worsen as more cybercriminals adopt these tools—and their capabilities improve.

top.title: The most exciting laptop I’ve seen in forever
top.summary: Framework’s Laptop 13 Pro is the most exciting new PC in forever | The Verge Skip to main content The homepage The Verge The Verge logo. (ChatGPT has had a connector for a while, Claude got it this week.) It’s such a fun, useful, surprising way to organize and discover music. I hate the icon, thanks for nothing Claude Code, but it’s the beginnings of the tool I’m trying to build bringing all this stuff together for me.

top.title: DeepSeek acaba de lanzar un modelo que compite con Opus 4.6. Cuesta siete veces menos y funciona en chips chinos
top.summary: Las pruebas internas de DeepSeek revelan que v4 Pro-Max (el mejor modelo con la mayor capacidad de razonamiento) supera o está al nivel de Claude Opus 4.6 Max, GPT-5.4 xHigh, Gemini 3.1 Pro High, Kimi K2.6 y GLM 5.1. Los números aun así son llamativos: en LiveCodeBench, una prueba de programación, DeepSeek v4-Pro-Max alcanza el 93,5% de puntuación frente al 88,8 de Opus 4.6 y el 91,7% de Gemini 3.1 Pro. DeepSeek acaba de lanzar un modelo que compite con Opus 4.6.

top.title: Health-care AI is here. We don’t know if it actually helps patients.
top.summary: The tools may be accurate, but that doesn’t necessarily mean they’ll improve health outcomes. “[Researchers] have evaluated provider or clinician and patient satisfaction, but not really how these tools are affecting clinical decision-making,” says Wiens. In a study published in January 2025 , Paige Nong at the University of Minnesota and her colleagues found that around 65% of US hospitals used AI-assisted predictive tools.

Modelos.title: Google unveils two new TPUs designed for the "agentic era"
Modelos.summary: Credit: Google The TPU 8t and TPU 8i will power Google’s Gemini-based agents in the future, but they are also designed with third-party developers in mind. Both new TPUs support the frameworks developers already use, including JAX, MaxText, PyTorch, SGLang, and vLLM. Ryan Whitwam – Apr 22, 2026 1:10 pm | 91 Google's TPU 8t chips were designed for training AI models, not running them.

Herramientas.title: AI needs a strong data fabric to deliver business value
Herramientas.summary: Organizations are deploying copilots, agents, and predictive systems across finance, supply chains, human resources, and customer operations. By MIT Technology Review Insights archive page April 22, 2026 In partnership with SAP Artificial intelligence is moving quickly in the enterprise, from experimentation to everyday use. The right data fabric allows organizations to scale AI safely, coordinate decisions across systems and agents, and ensure that automation reflects real business priorities rather than making decisions in isolation.

My favorite is a girl group called Isegye Idol , created by Woowakgood , a Korean VTuber (a streamer who likewise performs as a digital persona). Isegye Idol’s six members are anonymous, which seems to let them deploy a rare breed of honesty and humor.
